search.description: Searches your local library using a fuzzy global search or specific fields.

options.-a, --append: Append results to the current staging area
options.-t, --temp: Do not modify the staging area
options.--tag <expr>: Filter by tags using boolean logic
options.--star <expr>: Filter by star collections using boolean logic
options.--author <ex>: Filter by author using boolean logic
options.--year <ex>: Filter by year using boolean logic
options.--title <ex>: Filter by title using boolean logic

import.description: Intelligently imports PDFs, BibTeX files, or materializes staged [Online] papers. Duplicate PDFs are instantly skipped via MD5 hash checks.

options.-k, --keep-keys: Keep original cite_keys when importing BibTeX files

tag.description: Manages semantic tags for papers in your library.

star.description: Manages star collections (playlists) for organizing papers. Star names cannot contain spaces.

comment.description: Adds or clears a lightweight, plain-text comment directly in the database.

show.description: Displays detailed information about papers or outputs raw BibTeX.

options.--bibtex [v]: Outputs raw, copy-pasteable BibTeX. Optionally specify a version name.

export.description: Exports papers to raw, copy-pasteable BibTeX format.

options.--no-arxiv: Strictly filters out any version named 'arxiv'. Skips paper if no other version exists.

update.description: Refreshes paper metadata online, self-heals broken PDF links using hashes, and optionally synchronizes cite_keys.

options.--update-keys: Recalculates cite_keys based on the lexicographically first title and cascades changes to files and collections.

status.description: Displays the health, statistics, and inventory of the current library.

options.-d, --detailed: Show detailed statistics (top tags, missing PDFs)
options.-l, --list: List all papers in the database in a paginated table
options.-p, --page: Specify the page number when using the -l list view
